text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I approach the glass-walled chamber illuminated with enigmatic purple-blue light. The promise of research and development stirs thoughts on progress and human ingenuity. Once inside, surrounded by bold graphics and digital displays, a subtle optimism rises in me. Here, knowledge and creativity are honored; the walls themselves urge growth, both literal and figurative. There’s a gentle tension between practicality and the potential for a better, more thoughtful world. The environment prompts me to reflect on how, even within these sterile walls, imagination can thrive.
